findings.issue: ProfileProvider now silently swallows all profile fetch failures. The refactor routes through profileApi.get(), but the catch block only maps the error to signed-out state; unlike the previous implementation, transient network errors and non-401 backend failures no longer emit any diagnostic signal. That makes auth/profile outages much harder to distinguish from a normal anonymous session during LAN OAuth debugging.
findings.remediation: Log unexpected profile fetch failures in the catch block, while keeping the no-token and expected 401 paths quiet or handled explicitly.
